notes:
The Fabricator + Codex 4.8!

• NEW Crafting screen, styled after the in-game Fabrication Kiosk: all 1,545 blueprints from the SC 4.8 files with real quality→stat curves. Theory-craft any build, or craft from your actual inventory — with full Undo.
• Rock Break now runs on exact 4.8 gear values (every laser, module and gadget). Fun find: FLTR modules actually cost beam power.
• Codex 4.8: the game's own per-planet mineable lists (Stanton + Pyro, ✓-marked), exact rock difficulty stats, and exact quality bands. Inventory shows what off-band quality 'plays as'.

Estimates stay labeled — the crack formula and combine rules are CIG's.
